prompt_text: Open source or affordable billing tools instead of FastSpring
response:
# Billing & Payment Processing Alternatives to FastSpring

## Open Source Solutions

### **Stripe + Self-Hosted UI**
- **Cost:** Stripe fees (2.9% + $0.30) + hosting
- **Best for:** Custom control, SaaS billing
- **Tools:** Stripe Billing API, open-source dashboards
- https://stripe.com/billing

### **Medusa**
- **Cost:** Free, open source
- **Features:** Full ecommerce/subscription platform
- **Use case:** Digital products, subscriptions, recurring billing
- https://medusajs.com

### **Saleor**
- **Cost:** Free, open source
- **Features:** GraphQL-based, modern architecture
- **Good for:** Digital/physical products
- https://saleor.io

### **Invoice Ninja**
- **Cost:** Free self-hosted or affordable cloud
- **Features:** Invoicing, recurring billing, client portal
- https://www.invoiceninja.com

## Budget-Friendly Commercial Tools

| Tool | Monthly Base | Best For |
|------|-------------|----------|
| **Gumroad** | Free (takes 10%) | Digital products, simple checkout |
| **Lemonsqueezy** | Free (takes 8-10%) | Digital products, affiliates |
| **SendOwl** | Free plan available | Digital goods, courses |
| **Paddle** | No monthly fee | SaaS, subscriptions, global |
| **Chargify** | $65/mo | Subscription billing |
| **Zuora** | Custom pricing | Enterprise subscriptions |

## Lightweight DIY Options

- **WooCommerce** + Stripe (WordPress-based)
- **Shopify** ($39/mo) - simpler than FastSpring for many
- **Square Online** ($29/mo)

**What's your main use case?** (SaaS subscriptions, digital products, physical goods?)
